headline: Is Sezzle Inc. (SEZL) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is SEZL a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Sezzle Inc. on FluentInQuality’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on SEZL. Sezzle Inc.’s share was trading at $82.27 as of April 21st. SEZL’s trailing and forward P/E were 22.10 and 17.18 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Sezzle Inc. […]

headline: Fannie Mae, Freddie Mac Move Beyond FICO With New Credit Scoring Model To Boost Competition
